HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ADRIAN ADONA'S Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's counsel and counsel for defendant Overwatch stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Counsel for defendant Adrian Adona do not stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The matter is continued to August 16, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Counsel for defendant Adrian Adona are instructed to pay the required local court reporter fee in advance of the 8/16/19 hearing.
